title: Summary: Turn 57
content: Pueblo is a TypeScript/Node.js CLI+Desktop code agent with dual-modal entry (CLI or Electron), layered architecture (CLIâ†’Commandâ†’Agentâ†’Providerâ†’Toolâ†’Persistence), and a Pepe sub-framework for long-term memory and semantic search. Key decisions: provider abstraction (GitHub Copilot, DeepSeek), slash command routing vs. plain text task execution, SQLite local persistence, and credential management via Windows Credential Manager or config file.
